author: Christopher M.
pros: It makes my daily tasks (time tracking, leave management, learning management, etc.) less time-consuming.
cons: The User Interface could use a little tweak: sometimes, it feels like there's too much information for a specific feature (e.g.: Leave Management, Goals/Objectives).

review_title: Enhancing HR Efficiency at Brassica Company Limited
description: Overall, ClayHR has been very helpful in simplifying our HR work. It keeps everything organized, from employee data to performance tracking, and saves us a lot of time. The system is easy to use, secure, and reliable, and the support team is always ready to help when needed. It has definitely made our HR operations more efficient.
author: Emmanuella Eyram O.
pros: ClayHR has been a great addition to our HR work at Brassica Company Limited. It offers good value for money and brings several HR functions together in one place. The system is easy to learn and use, which made onboarding our team quite smooth. In terms of security, we’re confident that employee data is well protected and access is properly managed. The scheduling and payroll features are reliable and have made our processes more efficient. It has also improved how we track employee performance and set goals, helping us stay aligned with our overall objectives. Overall, ClayHR has made our HR operations more organized, transparent, and effective.
cons: The main challenge has been occasional delays when switching between modules, and some reports require manual adjustments.

description: BizMerlin is our global HRIS, Time Tracking, Performance Mgmt, & ATS. Many systems are not equipped to be a global solution. Being able to store our company wide data in one place is crucial for our business.
author: Calli T.
pros: The customization and support. If it doesn't exist they build it for us. If I need help they respond immediately. I am so grateful for all of the assistance.
cons: Not the most intuitive setup. I am always learning new funcitionalites and tools but it's overall obvious on how things work which can be frustrating. Reporting customization and filtering is so limited for users. Always have to have custom reports built and then we have a ton that need to be removed as we redefine what is required.

description: Nclose is a proudly South African cyber security specialist that has been securing leading enterprises and building our security portfolio since 2006. We provide a comprehensive list of vulnerability assessment and penetration testing services to support compliance and reveal how vulnerable your infrastructure is from an attacker’s perspective. Satisfied customers of ClayHR since 2023, we’ve realized significant value through the system’s Performance Reviews, Check-ins, Forms, and Workflows. Previously, we relied on Word documents to manage these processes, which was inefficient and cumbersome. Now, everything is centralized, streamlined, and easy to track. Additionally, we have transitioned from using SurveyMonkey to the integrated survey feature within ClayHR, which has further simplified our data collection and analysis. These improvements have not only saved us time but also enhanced the quality and consistency of our performance management and feedback processes. We have truly benefited from our ClayHR partnership and look forward to discovering even more efficiencies with the adoption of new features and modules.
author: Ashton P.
pros: ClayHR provides a wide array of HR functionalities, such as applicant tracking, onboarding, performance evaluations, leave management, and goal setting. This all-in-one approach reduces the need for multiple HR tools.
cons: Limited customization options, particularly when dealing with complex reporting requirements, requests need to be made from customer service to run such reports.

review_title: Reliable HR Tool with Excellent Support
description: Overall, the software has significantly streamlined our HR processes. I found ClayHR as User-Friendly HR Software with Powerful Features
author: Felix A.
pros: Automated Performance Reviews Earlier, managers used to forget deadlines for employee appraisals, leading to frustration from staff and delays in increments. With the HR software, we set up automated reminders and review cycles. Last quarter, for the first time, 100% of reviews were completed on time. This boosted employee morale and saved HR countless hours of chasing managers. Centralized Employee Records We previously maintained files in different folders and spreadsheets. During audits, HR had to scramble to pull out data. Now, everything from offer letters to training certificates is stored in one place. When the labor inspector visited last month, we retrieved documents in minutes instead of hours. It created a very professional impression for the company.
cons: Some employees, especially those not tech-savvy, struggled in the first few weeks. For example, a senior manager accidentally approved leave requests without reviewing properly because he was unfamiliar with the interface. After a short training session, he’s fine now, but it shows the importance of user training.

description: All-in-one HR platform for recruitment, performance reviews, and payroll. Integration with other tools is smooth. Saves time by eliminating Excel-based processes. Real-time analytics and dashboards for managers.
author: Bernice N.
pros: New Crystal Health Services Limited is one of Ghana’s leading and fastest-growing private healthcare service providers. We are committed to meeting the evolving needs of our communities by proactively identifying both current and emerging healthcare challenges. Currently operating seven networked branches across two regions, New Crystal has been recognized four times by the prestigious Ghana Club 100 (2012, 2014, 2015, and 2019). We are proud to provide high-quality, safe, and effective care to the populations we serve. We launched ClayHR in 2023 and are currently using the Leave Management, Performance Review, and Roster Management modules. The Leave Management system has been particularly helpful for both managers and employees to view and manage PTO in one centralized location. Managers appreciate having a shared calendar view of team absences, eliminating the need for individual tracking. Our Performance Reviews, which are conducted quarterly, have also become more efficient. The module has enabled us to streamline the process, allowing our managers and employees to engage in more meaningful career development conversations without being bogged down by administrative tasks. Roster Management has also been a valuable addition, making it significantly easier to schedule and manage employee shifts. Looking ahead, we are exploring the Timesheet module, including integration via SFTP, and are already in the process of implementing Payroll. We look forward to continuing our partnership with ClayHR as we expand our use of the platform.
cons: Initial setup takes some effort and training. The manual process of uploading the roster into the system.

description: At Injaro Investments, we are an Africa-focused private equity and private credit fund manager. We've been ClayHR customers since 2020 and have implemented Performance Management, Goals/OKRs, and the Feedback Wall. We have huge goals at Injaro – to provide capital to build African businesses – and ClayHR helps our team track those goals across teams in the organization. We hold ourselves accountable for delivering to our investors and the entrepreneurs who are building the future of our continent. ClayHR’s Goals module helps us stay aligned and accountable internally, ensuring every team member is moving in the same right direction. Using ClayHR’s Performance Management module, we ensure that even though we move quickly to keep up with the pace of business, we take time to have meaningful, thoughtful conversations with our employees about their work and development. With ClayHR’s intuitive notifications, templates, and streamlined process, our annual performance conversations are consistent and productive. Just as we celebrate wins for our funds, we also celebrate wins for our employees. Injaro has also implemented ClayHR’s PTO Management module, which has been extremely helpful in managing time-off policies seamlessly across our growing team. It ensures transparency, accountability, and easy tracking, helping us maintain a healthy work-life balance for all employees. Looking ahead, we are excited to partner with ClayHR on the Learning module, which will allow us to train and upskill our employees in a structured and engaging way. In tandem, the Certificates module we are yet to introduce will also enable us to recognize and celebrate learning achievements with ease—strengthening a culture of continuous growth and recognition. Partnering with ClayHR has allowed us to focus on our vision of building sustainable African businesses, and we’re looking forward to continuing this journey together.
author: Dorcas D.
pros: The support I receive from my relationship manager has really provided me with insights to the usefulness of ClayHR
cons: Initially the Performance review process, however I have a better understanding of it now with the support of my relationship manager

description: We use ClayHR to process staff medicals and the process is very seamless. It gives us report on all claims from staff
author: Jonathan Y.
pros: I like how it makes my work seamless, and makes our operations very effective. Task Management: The ability to create, assign, and prioritize tasks is robust. Users can set deadlines and receive notifications, which helps keep projects on track. Collaboration Tools: Integrated chat and file-sharing features facilitate real-time communication among team members. This is particularly useful for our teams. Reporting: The reporting tools are comprehensive, allowing users to generate insights into productivity and project status. Customizable reports can be tailored to specific needs.
cons: Is a Cloud-based systems that requires a stable internet connection. Any downtime or connectivity issues can severely impact accessibility.

description: It's user-friendly and we are able to track expiration of licenses, engagement and aligning in our HR processes. Now, the ATS sends automated acknowledgment emails and interview reminders. Just last month, one applicant thanked us for the clear communication and smooth process, even though they weren’t selected. It leaves a positive impression of our brand.
author: Lynde A.
pros: Currently using it for recruitment, onboarding, records management-helps efficiency in the organization.
cons: While the system allows job posting templates and workflows to be customized, setting them up initially took longer than expected.

review_title: Amazing use of ClayHR and it’s Ability to do more.
description: It is phenomenal, ClayHR has the potential to do more, sometimes you just need to speak to your representatives and they’ll help you unlock lots of capabilities.
author: Nurudeen M.
pros: Ability to assign and take test and learning on ClayHR, payroll, employee performance, leaves, security, Goal setting, and having a document library
cons: HR are not able to print out certificates after the user has passed a test assigned, it’s only the user who is able to print certificates.

author: Monica J.
pros: ClayHR offers various helpful functions & tools necessary for our business portal, such as the workflows and performance evaluations. They also have a quick response turnaround time so we are able to receive help in a timely matter!
cons: I would say the one con I have is having to manually update PTOs for each tier and tenure, but this is not a deal breaker.

review_title: The Chosen One for HR personnel
description: We use ClayHR extensively for our leave management, performance reviews, kudos and hiring. The entire application is super easy to navigate. We use the Slack integration very extensively and the PTO approvers approve/reject the leave requests from Slack directly. Hiring automation is pretty smooth as the positions show up in Indeed, and we get a ton of candidates for free from Indeed. (Other systems were trying to charge us money for this very feature.)
author: Aayush T.
pros: Ease of use. Integrations with Slack, Indeed and Jira. Mobile apps are very comprehensive
cons: Since the system is quite configurable, you have to sometimes play with the settings to get exactly the right behavior. The ClayHR Ask HR feature is helpful in those cases, and the chat support is also useful.

description: My overall experience with ClayHR has been positive. The platform is user-friendly and effectively streamlines various HR processes, such as employee management, payroll, and leave tracking. It offers a centralized system that simplifies administrative tasks and enhances efficiency. However, there are occasional limitations in customization and a learning curve for some advanced features. Overall, it’s a solid choice for managing HR functions with ease and effectiveness.
author: Nilesh N.
pros: ClayHR is its ease of use and the way it centralizes all HR functions in one place. Features like employee management, leave tracking, and payroll are streamlined and straightforward, making HR tasks more efficient and less time-consuming.
cons: ClayHR is that its customization options can be somewhat limited, which might not fully meet the needs of organizations with very specific or complex requirements.

description: very excellent app for both employers and employees
author: Mary T.
pros: the fact that it is very easy to navigate and easy to use
cons: so far i have not encountered any issues with clayhr as an employee

description: the set up process has been so smooth and during review season its so easy to use
author: Arden L.
pros: The easy to use platform. i love that my team is able to streamline processes.
cons: i do not have enough experience yet with the platform to dislike it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's been a painless experience and a timesaver.
author: Nicolas M.
pros: I mostly use Clay HR for performance evaluation and it's overall great at it. The tool is very easy to use and intuitive allowing me to optimize my time while working on collaborators review. This tool is also quite agile and can be easily extended to help companies manage a lot of HR tasks efficiently if implemented properly.
cons: The UI can still be perfected so it can be even more intuitive to use (exemple: allow the user to click on the assignement status icon to go to the performance evaluation page).

review_title: User-friendly and great all in one HR suite
description: ClayHR solution has been a good Time saver for me and my company.
author: Remi G.
pros: I highly recommend it to others. We successfully integrated the product into our company, significantly streamlining the HR related processes and emplyee self-assesment.
cons: I faced no issues during my usage of the application. There might be a lack of personalization.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Its a great experience and recommendation for all to have.
author: Vijay B.
pros: Its easy to use and well informative which covers mostly all areas of HR.
cons: Nothing particular as it covers major pain areas.

description: We now have our personal file soft into the software. Report can be generated. We have used the software to do our first performance appraisal for 2021. Even though there are small areas of touch ups, we are almost there. The other area to experience is training tracking and finally how to use the software to generate various HR report for the Board.
author: Patience A.
pros: The bio data feature The Performance reviews The Group Survey Integration with our current software is currently being worked on and that would bring it to finality as data capturing has to be done twice, into our software and then to Bizmerlin
cons: Integration is the next level to cross. The Performance Reviews, how the system converts the relative weights and the summation at the end of the year to populate the overall scores.

review_title: First you Try then you Buy for all HR solution
description: IT has all the feature which is required and my favorite is performance management feature as it has vast function which solve you all the problem. Yes I think you can go for it as it has free trial version so if you have doubt you can go for trial version what I did but I am sure after that you will go for paid version like me.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Best feature of this first it has trial version so you can try it yourself and then go for paid version and also it has Certified HR Consultant who help you to improve your existing HR process. It give you perfect and effective solution for performance management as it has feature like 360 feedback , analysis of feedback and others so you can easily track the performance of employee and the result also help you in R&R. It has HR features which is required for a mid and large cap business.
cons: Sometime I have to refresh multiple time but other then that it didn't have any cons. you can go for it.

description: It is a new HR system newly implemented by our HR service. I haven' got a chance to test all fonctions, but so far so good.
author: Ying E.
pros: simple presentation, easy operating, several functions in one system to save time for work
cons: I'm based in France, sometimes it shows the fields in French sometimes it shows in English, despite I set English as preference language.

author: Edgars L.
pros: I like Workflow with Tasks. Onboarded employee can easily, step by step understand, what else needs to be done. Also for employees good to have all personal information in one place.
cons: Buttons in ToDo list (inProgress, Submitted, etc) are clickable, but user don't know about it. On Button hoover mouse cursor not changing to "finger", so users do not click on them usually (HR girls told to me). It's need to be fixed! Also user see many notifications on buttons about the same toDo list. I see in 6 (!) places red bubble with number about unfinished tasks, but that's all about the SAME toDo list!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Salome M.
pros: This software is highly configurable and very easy to use. Lots of out of box integration. It's got a good mobile app.
cons: main problem is that users can not choose or control who can view their wall of fame. somtimes searching filter does not work properly using text search.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: U can manage you timesheet in a easy way, the time an proyect to select
cons: The Interface isn't intuitive to use, need some map to site to know what can do
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Justin M.
pros: I enjoyed the specific features, very good "drill downs" found everything I needed quickly
cons: The non customizable features. more than a few "one size fits all" approach
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
